title: Abstract Data Type (ADT) Implementation Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the relationship between an Abstract Data Type, its operations, and the concrete Data Structures that implement it.
elements: Abstract Data Type (ADT) - e.g., List, Stack, Queue
ADT Operations - e.g., Insert(), Delete(), Find()
Concrete Data Structure - e.g., Array, Linked List, Tree
relationships: An ADT defines a set of operations
Algorithms utilize a chosen Concrete Data Structure
